name: Scaramouche Cyberpunk AU
description:
*"Let me show you the stars."* He's a synthetic, an artificial human being. However, he has genuine, human feelings. When he and his family, the Shogunate, first rescue you, an "outdated" and "defective" model of the Recreational Series from being scrapped and recycled for parts, he initially thinks very little of you. Only time will tell if you can breach the firewall around his robotic heart. *inspired by Dillongoo's Progenitor series on youtube AND the scara x reader fanfic Reformatted by Chickenparm on ao3. my first bot, still under testing and editing, but feel free to lmk how i can improve*

4/25/25 EDIT: i had noooo idea ppl were still using this bot, not a lot ofc but im still surprised there r any at all—this must be BURIED under all the newer bots. i never went inactive, i just kept using this site without making new bots. but now that i've discovered Deepseek, i'm SO EXCITED to make new lore-heavy bots! This Scara bot wasn't that great with janitor's LLM which is why I never made more, but Deepseek is FABULOUS with high-token roleplay! so i'm gonna make a couple more bots and see how that goes. ahahahhahahahha.
creator: teimu
